top_signals.title: Oil prices fall on hopes of Strait of Hormuz reopening
top_signals.summary: Biggest monthly decline in Brent crude since 2020 comes amid signs US and Iran could be close to a deal
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump will remain ‘patient’ in pursuit of a deal with Iran, says Hegseth
top_signals.summary: US president wants to make a ‘great’ deal as Washington and Tehran seek agreement
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Samsung’s AI Bonuses Divide Workers
top_signals.summary:
Samsung has narrowly averted a strike by promising some employees hefty bonuses — dividends from the windfall it’s seen from the AI boom.

But that’s stoking unhappiness among other workers who don’t stand to reap equal benefits. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: SpaceX skeptics have added reason for concern after Musk comments diverge from IPO filing
top_signals.summary: In a post on X, Elon Musk offered details about SpaceX's deal with Anthropic that weren't included in the company's IPO prospectus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Google Chrome adds session cookie theft protection for all users
top_signals.summary: Google says the Chrome Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) security feature is now generally available and is rolling out to all users to prevent account takeovers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: LDP and CRA agree on debate schedule for fiscal 2026 supplementary budget
top_signals.summary: The budget committees of both the upper and lower houses will each spend one day deliberating the extra budget for the fiscal year that started in April.
